title: Issuch's Skeletons x Fresh Animations
description: Skeleton variants compatible with Fresh Animations
body:
![Discord](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5f6cbe6e30f50da94aff2eb76fdb68c440eb46c7.png)
![https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/be27fc74ec25823c7ae6c0205038b3d419f4d7b3.png)
![CurseForge](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5267ff7a4de63cacf0d3520d0ab27fdc58865810.png)
![PlanetMinecraft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/40e6888d1cdef25608cef172d1e9ca76ae61e3f2.png)

[Discord](https://discord.gg/2GaXAPGCxE) 


________________________________________________
I present to you the texture pack: Issuchs's Skeletons x Fresh Animations. Diversify your game with these high-quality textures!
The set adds variants of skeleton mobs, where the equipment appears randomly.

<details>
<summary>Example 1</summary>

![Couple](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/31babee9ad1ceb7d76dd44ba299b2022dcc8f9b6.png)
</details>


<details>
<summary>Example 2</summary>

![One](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4abc34a74e873c40922f9396d048b9d57673d17a.png)

</details>


<details>
<summary>Set contents:</summary>
Wither skeleton:

- with shoulder pad
- with a scabbard for a sword
</details>


If you want to experience the texture pack to its fullest, use [Fresh Animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations).

This mob texture pack **also** works without Fresh Animations, parts of the equipment will also appear randomly, but in this case there will be no animation. 

Then put the texture pack **BELOW** Fresh Animations!!
![image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7dbf02d9da5b4bb7f981f9e7fb3c7faf3cb3c9e0.png)
